message:
feat: Add PyValue arithmetic for uncertain operands

Add Two-Flow Type System support to binary operations:
- isOperandUncertain(): check if operand has uncertain confidence
- genPyValueBinOp(): emit PyValue method calls for safe arithmetic
- Support add, sub, mul, div, floordiv, mod operations

When either operand is uncertain, uses safe PyValue.add() etc
instead of raw Zig operators that could panic on type mismatch.
